ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the security on the exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "last_price" TEXT /* Most recent trading price of the security */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry category the security belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of security (e.g., stocks, bonds) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the security */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Current market status (e.g., active, suspended, delisted) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry category */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry category */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent industry category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of security */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the security type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security type */,
  "is Tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the security type is tradable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the type information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date for which the price data is recorded */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Price at the opening of the trading day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Price at the closing of the trading day */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price during the trading day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price during the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the trading day */,
  "premarket_price" TEXT /* Price of the security in the pre-market session */,
  "aftermarket_price" TEXT /* Price of the security in the after-market session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date for which the market data is recorded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "PE_ratio" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the security */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield of the security */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Beta value of the security */,
  "52_week_high" TEXT /* 52-week high price of the security */,
  "52_week_low" TEXT /* 52-week low price of the security */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, financial analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the security */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the security data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_securities" (
  "portfolio_security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a portfolio and a security */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the security was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio security information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
